description_long: This is a medium-sized yacht floating on a calm, blue water surface, featuring a streamlined monohull painted in blue with a white superstructure. The yacht has a flat deck with two prominent smokestacks, a central cabin structure, and a tall mast positioned near the bow. The deck appears to be open with minimal railings, and there are several small details such as lifeboats or equipment visible on the deck. The hull has a rounded bow and a squared-off stern, with portholes along the side. The water surface is rendered as a flat, square plane, and there are a few scattered objects in the water nearby, possibly representing debris or buoys.
description: A blue and white yacht with a central cabin, two smokestacks, and a tall mast, floating on a calm water surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue hull, white superstructure, two smokestacks, and the tall mast at the bow.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the squared stern, central cabin, and scattered objects in the water behind the yacht.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the mast, smokestacks, and the open deck layout.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the pointed bow, mast, and the arrangement of deck features leading toward the stern.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a rounded bow and squared stern, painted blue with a white stripe and visible portholes along the side. The hull sits low in the water and has a smooth, continuous profile.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level open deck with a central cabin structure, two smokestacks, a tall mast near the bow, and minimal visible railings. Deck equipment and possible lifeboats or storage are present.
attribute_cabin_structure: Central rectangular cabin with a flat roof, two smokestacks, and several porthole-style windows. No doors or additional cabins are visible from the exterior.
